languages.text: "Далекое от истинного утверждение! Эффективность добычи прометия с данной точки превышала сто процентов эффективности святых технологий, но причина искажения была неуточнена".
"Certainly not! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."
languages.original_text: "Далекое от истинного утверждение! Эффективность добычи прометия с данной точки превышала сто процентов эффективности святых технологий, но причина искажения была неуточнена".

traits.locale_text: "This statement is far from true! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."
"Certainly not! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."
"Approximating a true statement! At that site, promethium extraction output exceeds our sacred technologies' productivity by one hundred percent."

"This statement is far from true! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."

"This statement is far from true! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."

"This statement is far from true! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."
"Certainly not! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."

languages.text: 「真の事実を近似する！その地点では、プロメチウムの抽出量、我らの聖なる技術の生産量を100%超える」
languages.original_text: "Approximating a true statement! At that site, promethium extraction output exceeds our sacred technologies' productivity by one hundred percent."

traits.locale_text: 「真の事実を近似する！その地点では、プロメチウムの抽出量、我らの聖なる技術の生産量を100%超える。」

languages.text: «¡Desde luego que no! En esa instalación, la producción de prometio excedió el cien por cien de la capacidad de las tecnologías sagradas, sin que se descubriera la causa de la irregularidad».
languages.original_text: "Certainly not! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."

traits.locale_text: «¡Desde luego que no! En esa instalación, la producción de prometio excedió el cien por cien de la capacidad de las tecnologías sagradas, sin que se descubriera la causa de la irregularidad».

languages.text: “当然没有！该地的钷素开采效率超过了神圣技术产能的100%，但造成此异常情况的原因尚未查明。”
languages.original_text: "Certainly not! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."

traits.locale_text: “当然没有！该地的钷素开采效率超过了神圣技术产能的100%，但造成此异常情况的原因尚未查明。”

languages.text: "Sicher nicht! Die Produktivität der Promethiumextraktion lag hundert Prozent über der Kapazität der heiligen Technologien, aber der Grund für diese Irregularität wurde nicht bestätigt."
languages.original_text: "Certainly not! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."

traits.locale_text: "Sicher nicht! Die Produktivität der Promethiumextraktion lag hundert Prozent über der Kapazität der heiligen Technologien, aber der Grund für diese Irregularität wurde nicht bestätigt."

languages.text: "Kesinlikle hayır! Tesisteki prometyum çıkarma verimliliği, kutsal teknolojilerin kapasitesinin yüzde yüzünü aştı. Ancak bu anormalliğin nedeni tespit edilemedi."
languages.original_text: "Certainly not! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."

traits.locale_text: "Kesinlikle hayır! Tesisteki prometyum çıkarma verimliliği, kutsal teknolojilerin kapasitesinin yüzde yüzünü aştı. Ancak bu anormalliğin nedeni tespit edilemedi."

languages.text: « Certainement pas ! Sur ce site, le taux d'extraction du prométhium a surpassé de cent pour cent celui de nos technologies sacrées, mais la cause de cette irrégularité n'a pas pu être identifiée. »
languages.original_text: "Certainly not! At that site, the productivity of promethium extraction exceeded one hundred percent of the sacred technologies' capacity, but the cause for this irregularity was not ascertained."

traits.locale_text: « Certainement pas ! Sur ce site, le taux d'extraction du prométhium a surpassé de cent pour cent celui de nos technologies sacrées, mais la cause de cette irrégularité n'a pas pu être identifiée. »
